name: @overdraw/plugin-canvas
description: Canvas workspace provider (docs/canvas-design.md): registers in the 'workspace' namespace with the same verb/event/action surface as plugin-workspace-default (whose registry it shares), and additionally publishes each output's shown workspace as an explicit layout island. Selected in place of the default workspace plugin by a `canvas` config slice. Workspace-parity today; world positions, camera policy, and bookmarks build on this.
